title: Fee
doc_html:
§17.3. Fee

            The fee to install the application to display a digitized credential shall not exceed six dollars per credential.

            Acts 2019, No. 220, §1, eff. June 11, 2019.
doc_text:
§17.3.  Fee
The fee to install the application to display a digitized credential shall not exceed six
dollars per credential.
Acts 2019, No. 220, §1, eff. June 11, 2019.
